allow: Bash(python -m pip install -q aiogram==3.13.1 aiohttp aiosqlite apscheduler python-dotenv loguru pytz pytest pytest-asyncio)
Bash(python -m pip install --no-compile -q pytest pytest-asyncio loguru aiosqlite python-dotenv)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from bot.formatters import format_event; from datetime import time, datetime; r={'importance':0,'person_name':'Иванов','door_name':'КП1 Выход','direction':'out','event_name':None,'event_type':'600005','occurred_at':datetime\(2026,4,28,10,44,52\)}; print\(format_event\(r, time\(7,45\), time\(16,0\)\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from bot.formatters import format_event; from datetime import time, datetime; r={'importance':0,'person_name':'Ivanov','door_name':'KP1 exit','direction':'out','event_name':None,'event_type':'600005','occurred_at':datetime\(2026,4,28,10,44,52\)}; print\(format_event\(r, time\(7,45\), time\(16,0\)\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from config import load_config; cfg=load_config\(\); print\('admin_ids:', cfg.tg.admin_ids\); print\('chat_alerts:', cfg.tg.chat_alerts\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import bot.i18n, bot.formatters, bot.report_csv, bot.handlers, bot.notifier, reports.daily, db; print\('OK'\)")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Volume Shadow Copies on D: ==="; vssadmin list shadows /for=D: 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Recycle Bin \(D:\) ==="; if \(Test-Path "D:\\`$Recycle.Bin"\) { Get-ChildItem "D:\\`$Recycle.Bin" -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "env" } | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output "No recycle bin on D:" })
Bash(sqlite3 bot.db "SELECT person_name, door_name, direction, occurred_at FROM events WHERE direction='in' ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 5;")

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('bot.db'\); cur=c.execute\(\\"SELECT person_name, door_name, direction, occurred_at FROM events WHERE direction='in' ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 5\\"\); [print\(r\) for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]")
PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('bot.db'\); print\([d[1] for d in c.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(persons_inside\)'\).fetchall\(\)]\)")
PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['config.py', 'main.py', 'reports/daily.py']]; print\('OK'\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; chcp 65001 | Out-Null; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from config import load_config; cfg = load_config\(\); print\('admin_ids:', cfg.tg.admin_ids\); print\('chat_alerts:', cfg.tg.chat_alerts\); print\('chat_reports:', cfg.tg.chat_reports\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; chcp 65001 | Out-Null; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['config.py', 'main.py', 'reports/daily.py', 'db.py']]; print\('Syntax OK'\); from config import load_config; cfg = load_config\(\); print\('chat_group_filters:', {k: sorted\(v\) for k, v in cfg.tg.chat_group_filters.items\(\)}\); print\('auto_sync_groups:', cfg.auto_sync_groups\); print\('chat_reports:', cfg.tg.chat_reports\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; chcp 65001 | Out-Null; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from config import load_config; cfg = load_config\(\); print\({k: sorted\(v\) for k, v in cfg.tg.chat_group_filters.items\(\)}\)")
